summary: Find deals going quiet and draft timely nudges — every send and every stage change waits for your sign-off.

definition.name: Stale-deal nudger
definition.description: Daily sweep: echo finds deals with no recent activity and drafts a re-engagement nudge per contact; ledger proposes stage corrections for deals that have clearly lapsed. Every email and every CRM mutation routes through Greenlight.

greenlight.note: Nudge emails and stage moves from this playbook always wait for approval.
